nasb.text: So Nebuzaradan the captain of the bodyguard sent word, along with Nebushazban the Rab-saris, and Nergal-sar-ezer the Rab-mag, and all the leading officers of the king of Babylon;

esv.text: So Nebuzaradan the captain of the guard, Nebushazban the Rab-saris, Nergal-sar-ezer the Rab-mag, and all the chief officers of the king of Babylon

cnv.text: 於是護衛長尼布撒拉旦、大臣尼布沙斯班、術士長尼甲．沙利薛，以及巴比倫王所有的大臣都派人去，

ccb.text: 于是，护卫长尼布撒拉旦、尼布沙斯班、尼甲·沙利薛等巴比伦王的所有将领，
